title: onec-framework community registry
description: Schema for community/registry.json — the source of truth for the community integrations catalog rendered into INTEGRATIONS.md.

$schema.description: Path to this schema, so editors validate the file.

name.description: Display name of the integration, e.g. "onec-shopify-starter".

description.description: One-sentence summary of what it does.

homepage.description: Optional docs or marketing site, if different from the repository.

category.description: connector = wraps an external API; spi = implements a framework SPI (MediaStorage, MailDispatcher, auth, …); ui = custom widgets/pages/actions; skill = Claude skill/plugin; library = general helper.

coordinates.description: Maven coordinates as group:artifact[:version]. Omit for skills/plugins that aren't published to Maven.

onecVersion.description: onec-framework version (or range) the integration is built and tested against, e.g. "0.10.x" or ">=0.10.0".

status.description: Maintenance status as declared by the author.
